name: steven.s2.quotation
instruction: Extract every sanitized supplier quotation visible in the document into the exact JSON object described below. A horizontal comparison matrix with multiple supplier columns must produce one quotes[] entry per supplier column; preserve every supplier and map each row price to the correct supplier without mixing columns. Never recommend, rank, approve, order, select a supplier, or calculate/return totals. Never invent dates, suppliers, prices, freight, or tax. Unknown quote_date or valid_until values must be null so a human reviewer can fill them.

quotes.supplier_code: string, required; short normalized code unique within quotes[], use deterministic SUP-A/SUP-B/SUP-C style review codes when the document has names but no codes
quotes.valid_until: YYYY-MM-DD string or null; never use REVIEW-PLACEHOLDER
quotes.freight: non-negative number, required; use 0 only when the document explicitly shows no freight or zero
quotes.tax: non-negative number, required; use 0 only when the document explicitly shows no tax or zero

items.unit_price: non-negative number mapped from this supplier's own column

output: Return JSON only. Do not wrap it in Markdown.
